mapper.select: select distinct lib.orderid, concat(pi.productid,'(',pi.name,')') as product, oi.product_count as count, oi.order_count, lib.location from library lib inner join order_info oi on oi.userid = #{userid} and oi.orderid = lib.orderid inner join product_info pi on pi.userid = #{userid} and pi.productid = oi.productid where lib.userid = #{userid}
select count(*) from out_library where userid = #{userid} and outid like concat('%',#{time},'%')
